name: Your Family
text: Happy 70th Birthday, Mary! From the people who love you most — here are 70 moments just for you as we celebrate 70 incredible years. This one’s all yours!

name: Joseph
text: Circa early 1990’s, you lovingly hosted us all in your home in Denver for Thanksgiving that included sledding, a pizza night & skiing. ❤️ Happy Birthday! ❤️

name: Maria Fernandez
text: I was six years old when Mary came into my life. Larry took her to his prom. I remember that day like it was yesterday - especially the two of them pulling away in the orange pinto! One of my most special memories was the first Christmas Mary spent with our family. The photo is not very clear but she made me a flannel night gown that was a light blue floral print. I literally wore it out - until there were holes and I could not wear it any more. I don't consider Mary an in-law, she is another one of my sisters.

name: Judy & Joe
text: Mary, you have this special gift of knowing things of the heart. You create beautiful crafts with care, attention to detail and love, for those you love. Every piece is a treasure, just as you are treasured.
